# init(targetElement:)

**Initializer**

Creates an item result with the specified target element.

## Declaration

```swift
init(targetElement: any NSAccessibilityElementProtocol)
```

## Creating an Item Result

- **init(itemLoadingToken:customLabel:)**: Creates an item result with the specified item load token and custom label.

items.description: Creates an item result with the specified item load token and custom label.
items.name: init(itemLoadingToken:customLabel:)
